xposts.title: Experience as VR projected into virtual observer
xposts.excerpt: Your experience is a simulation, a virtual reality projected into a virtual observer. The observer is a model of what it would be like if you existed, were uploaded into a monkey and deeply invested in its affairs. The model is used to drive a monkey in the physical universe.

xposts.title: Conscious observer is a simulation of unified agent
xposts.excerpt: It seems pretty clear that we, the conscious observer, are a simulation, of what it would be like if we existed as a unified agent, perceiving the models our brain generates and cared about them. Consciousness is simulated.

xposts.title: Consciousness is the dream of dreaming
xposts.excerpt: Consciousness is the dream of dreaming. It establishes the perception that percepts are being perceived. Consciousness is a type of representation, a pattern that gains efficacy by an interpreter that translates it into actions that extend and modify the pattern.

xposts.title: Qualia as feature vectors to self-model simulation
xposts.excerpt: Qualia are feature vectors of a present world model, presented to the simulation of a unified and motivated real-time observer. They change the dynamics of the self model. The self model registers its reaction to qualia, and maintains a protocol that it can access.

xposts.title: Consciousness as autocatalytic pattern in substrate
xposts.excerpt: Consciousness is autocatalytic: it feeds on the substrate conditions it creates. ... Your experience is a simulation... Consciousness is the dream of dreaming.

terms.title: simulation (of observer/self)
terms.definition: The conscious observer is a model/simulated agent that the brain projects experience into; it registers reactions to qualia/feature vectors of the world model and drives behavior as if a unified motivated self existed in the physical substrate.

terms.title: consciousness
terms.definition: A representational pattern that perceives percepts as being perceived (dream of dreaming); autocatalytic, either on or off, sustained by the conditions it creates rather than substrate alone.
